overview.label: Token model
overview.value: Semantic CSS custom properties, authored in OKLCH.
overview.note: Components consume --primary, --muted, --border… directly; no primitive token tier is shipped.

overview.label: Scale source
overview.value: Borrowed Tailwind v4 palette plus shadcn’s custom neutrals.
overview.note: 28 ramps — 9 neutral, 17 chromatic, and pure black/white.

overview.label: Themes
overview.note: The default base is neutral; accent themes repaint primary/ring and their sidebar twins.

overview.label: Modes
overview.note: Scales are mode-invariant; only the semantic token map changes between modes.

overview.label: Point-of-use colours
overview.note: Opacity modifiers, color-mix, and relative-oklch tints — never declared tokens.

layers.name: Primitive scale
layers.note: Borrowed Tailwind v4 palette (plus custom neutrals); referenced by tokens, not by components.

layers.name: Semantic tokens
layers.note: The CSS custom properties every component paints from.

layers.name: Point-of-use derivations
layers.note: No component token tier — components consume semantic tokens directly plus in-class derivations (see the usage section).

ramps.name: amber
ramps.note: Borrowed Tailwind v4 palette (with shadcn’s custom neutrals); mode-invariant — the same value paints in light and dark. oklch normalized from the source’s comma syntax.

ramps.note: Pure static colour — mode-invariant.

focus.label: Focus ring
focus.note: Components paint the ring at reduced opacity, e.g. ring-ring/50 (see the usage section).

derivedColors.note: Colours that exist only at point of use in component styles — opacity-modified tokens, color-mix, and relative-oklch tints. Extracted from style-nova, shadcn’s default style.

notes.text: Scales are the borrowed Tailwind v4 palette plus shadcn’s custom neutrals. They do not vary by colour scheme — the same value paints in light and dark.

One theme per token group. The seven base-neutral themes ship a full token set; accent themes override only primary/ring and their sidebar twins. References point at the Tailwind step shadcn resolves each value to.

Point-of-use colours are extracted from style-nova, shadcn’s default style — the other styles derive colours the same way. Opacity modifiers resolve to the color-mix Tailwind emits; relative-oklch expressions are kept verbatim.

provenance.notes: Ramps come from _legacy-colors.ts (the palette source; the generated public/r/colors/index.json is a stale subset that omits the four custom neutrals). Its nonstandard comma oklch syntax is normalized to space-separated CSS on emit. Derived colours are extracted from style-nova only — shadcn’s default style; the other styles repeat the same derivations. The bases/{base,radix} component tsx carry a small number of additional opacity-modified token uses (~15 each, no color-mix) that are not vendored, so a handful of point-of-use colours may be missing from the usage section.
